name: memory-system
description: Project-local knowledge tooling for Claude Code: generate-rules (scaffold .claude/rules/), init-memory (bootstrap docs/memory/ + auto memory), knowledge-updater (update CLAUDE.md/rules/memory after changes), reorganize (migrate flat → 2-level memory). Plus pre-commit-gate hook that blocks commits when knowledge is stale. All brain2 vault interaction (memory-{recall,store}, project-memory-{recall,store}, ingest/query/lint) lives in the second-brain plugin instead.
